nodes.label: CVOps app icon
nodes.rationale: White orbital mark — an open ring encircling a solid center dot with a small bird-beak/play notch on the upper-left of the ring — on a blue vertical-gradient rounded-square tile. Ships as the CVOps application icon set (favicon, PWA icons, and apple-touch-icon) exported at 16, 32, 48, 64, 128, 180, 192, 256, and 512 px; all nine PNGs are the same glyph at different resolutions, represented here as one concept rather than per-resolution nodes.
